Hearing On Petition To Approve Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Jun-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on Petition to Approve the Compromise of Disputed Claims of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Deborah Neville, CSR 703.

John J. Veth, Esq. appeared with petitioner Lori Rezabek-Kells, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minor claimants Lauren Kells and Margaret Kells, both of whom were present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Total Settlement - $100,000.00

Attorney's Fees - Petitioner to pay.
Medical Expenses - Petitioner to pay.
Costs - Petitioner to pay.

A net balance of $100,000.00 for each minor shall be deposited with PASSCorp Assignment Company as a Single Premium Deferred Annuity, to be paid after the minor reaches the age of 18 years old and in accordance with the structured settlement approved by the Court.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.
